ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bombs" (
  "bomb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bomb configuration */,
  "bomb_name" TEXT /* Name of the bomb configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bomb configuration */,
  "complexity_level" INTEGER /* Complexity level of the bomb (1-5) */,
  "time_limit" INTEGER /* Time limit for defusing the bomb in seconds */,
  "bomb_type" TEXT /* Type of bomb (e.g., simple, complex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bomb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port (e.g., Serial, Parallel, DVI-D, Stereo RCA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bomb_ports" (
  "bomb_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bomb configuration */,
  "port_id" INTEGER /* ID of the port */,
  "is_present" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the port is present on the bomb */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bomb_id", "port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_holders" (
  "battery_holder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery holder */,
  "battery_holder_name" TEXT /* Name of the battery holder (e.g., AA, AAA, D) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the battery holder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battery_holder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bomb_battery_holders" (
  "bomb_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bomb configuration */,
  "battery_holder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery holder */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of battery holders present on the bomb */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bomb_id", "battery_holder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strikes" (
  "strike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strike */,
  "strike_name" TEXT /* Name of the strike (e.g., electrical, mechanical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bomb_strikes" (
  "bomb_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bomb configuration */,
  "strike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strike */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of strikes present on the bomb */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bomb_id", "strike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition (e.g., 3 or more battery holders are present) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defusal_rules" (
  "defusal_rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defusal rule */,
  "bomb_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bomb configuration */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition affecting defusal success rate */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate for the defusal rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defusal_rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defusal_rules_bomb_id FOREIGN KEY ("bomb_id") REFERENCES bombs ("bomb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defusal_rules_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trainer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trainer */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainers_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Trainer, Student, Administrator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "training_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "bomb_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bomb configuration */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the training session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training session in minutes */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_bomb_id FOREIGN KEY ("bomb_id") REFERENCES bombs ("bomb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defusal_attempts" (
  "defusal_attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defusal attempt */,
  "training_session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the defusal attempt was successful */,
  "time_taken" INTEGER /* Time taken to defuse the bomb in seconds */,
  "number_of_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts made */,
  "detailed_feedback" TEXT /* Detailed feedback from the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defusal_attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defusal_attempts_training_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("training_session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "condition_results" (
  "condition_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition result */,
  "defusal_attempt_id" INTEGER /* ID of the defusal attempt */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition */,
  "result" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the condition was met */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_condition_results_defusal_attempt_id FOREIGN KEY ("defusal_attempt_id") REFERENCES defusal_attempts ("defusal_attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_condition_results_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "port_results" (
  "port_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port result */,
  "defusal_attempt_id" INTEGER /* ID of the defusal attempt */,
  "port_id" INTEGER /* ID of the port */,
  "result" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the port was correctly used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_port_results_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("port_id") REFERENCES ports ("port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_port_results_defusal_attempt_id FOREIGN KEY ("defusal_attempt_id") REFERENCES defusal_attempts ("defusal_attempt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_holder_results" (
  "battery_holder_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery holder result */,
  "defusal_attempt_id" INTEGER /* ID of the defusal attempt */,
  "battery_holder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery holder */,
  "result" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the battery holder was correctly used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battery_holder_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_holder_results_defusal_attempt_id FOREIGN KEY ("defusal_attempt_id") REFERENCES defusal_attempts ("defusal_attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_holder_results_battery_holder_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_holder_id") REFERENCES battery_holders ("battery_holder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strike_results" (
  "strike_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strike result */,
  "defusal_attempt_id" INTEGER /* ID of the defusal attempt */,
  "strike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strike */,
  "result" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the strike was correctly used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strike_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strike_results_defusal_attempt_id FOREIGN KEY ("defusal_attempt_id") REFERENCES defusal_attempts ("defusal_attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strike_results_strike_id FOREIGN KEY ("strike_id") REFERENCES strikes ("strike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "training_session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate for the training session */,
  "average_time" REAL /* Average time taken for defusal attempts */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Detailed performance metrics */,
  "trends" TEXT /* Trends observed in the training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_training_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("training_session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member (trainer or student) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the member in the team (Trainer or Student) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "member_id")
)
